tool.name: set-active-tags
tool.description:
Runtime tool-visibility switch. Replaces the current session's active tool tags. Only affects the current session; the next ReAct iteration re-evaluates which tools are exposed to the LLM.
**Parameters**: - `tags`: array of tag names to activate (e.g. ["readonly", "channel:webui"]). An empty array clears all active tags (= full visibility, no tag filtering).
**Semantics**: - Tools whose tags intersect the active set remain visible. - Tools without tags are hidden when activeTags is non-empty (they don't match any active tag). - Meta tools (like this one) are always visible regardless of activeTags. - This overwrites the previous active tags — it does not merge.
